Contact me

About me

I'm Khaled, a third-year student at Taylor's University specializing in artificial intelligence, deep learning, and computer vision, with hands-on experience in mechatronics. I'm driven by one idea: getting models off the screen and onto real machines that perceive and act in the physical world. Let's build something that sees.

Contact me

Skills

01

Computer Vision

Detection, recognition, and tracking from images and live video — building the perception layer that lets a system understand what it's looking at.

02

Deep Learning

Designing, training, and tuning neural networks — CNNs and modern architectures — to solve real classification, detection, and prediction problems.

03

Edge AI

Deploying models on-device with Jetson and Raspberry Pi: quantization, optimization, and real-time inference where the cloud isn't an option.

04

Embedded & IoT

Mechatronics roots — sensors, microcontrollers (ESP32/Arduino), and MQTT pipelines that connect physical hardware to intelligent software.

05

Data & ML Workflow

Cleaning, labeling, and shipping — taking a model from notebook to a working, measurable product with Python, PyTorch, and OpenCV.

// In Production

Models, shipped.

From a notebook to something people actually use — deployed on Hugging Face, pushing live alerts, and running full product dashboards.

SignBridge · Hugging Face

Background working with ML models and deploying them live as Hugging Face Spaces.

AquaGuard · Telegram

Experience wiring on-device models to instant notifications — pushing real-time alerts the moment something is detected.

ClimaShield · Web Dashboard

Broad experience building full web apps — connecting them to sensors, Raspberry Pi, and databases, with complete product sites and control dashboards.

Data Science & Model Training

Comfortable across the full ML workflow — EDA and data wrangling, training and evaluation, and the programming to ship it. Here: training a kid/adult detector end-to-end in Google Colab.

EDATrainingEvaluationProgramming

Operating Systems & APIs

At home across different operating systems and wiring them together over APIs — for example, streaming live sensor data from a Raspberry Pi straight into the Blynk cloud dashboard.

LinuxRaspberry Pi OSREST APIsSensor → Cloud
Leadership · Team

Projects

01
ClimaShieldEdge AI · Smart Agriculture
Project Files Source Code

Senses crop stress, decides on-device with a Random Forest model, and auto-deploys shade — protection that keeps working even offline.

// In plain words
✓A camera watches your plants
✓Spots leaf disease early
✓Drops shade automatically when it gets too hot
✓Keeps working even with no internet
FULL PROTOTYPE · GROW RIG

AquaGuardComputer Vision · Edge AI
Project Files Test Docs Source Code

An AI smart camera that watches the water, detects drowning in real time, and fires an instant alert — safety that runs on the edge.

// In plain words
✓A smart camera watches the pool
✓Spots a child in danger near the water
✓Sends an instant alert to your phone
✓Decided on-device, in real time
